[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111110 7
1 1110001011 6
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0001100011 4
5 1100010001 4
6 1001001011 5
7 1100110010 5

01 10 0000000001 1
12 21 1000000001 2
23 32 1000000010 2
34 43 1000010010 3
45 54 0001000000 1
56 65 0001000100 2
67 76 0010001010 3
70 07 0000000011 2

02 20 0001000011 3
13 31 1100010000 3
24 42 1001000011 4
35 53 0000000000 a match 2 3
46 64 0011010010 4
57 75 0000000000 a match 2 3
60 06 0001100010 3
71 17 1100000001 3

03 30 0000100010 2
14 41 1000010001 3
25 52 0001000000 1
36 63 0000110010 3
47 74 1010000011 4
50 05 0001000000 1
61 16 0000010000 1
72 27 1000001011 4

04 40 0001000011 3
15 51 0000000000 a match 2 3
26 62 0001001010 3
37 73 1100000010 3
[completion]

1 absent
